confirmed.text: The speed of light in vacuum is approximately 300,000 kilometers per second.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: The speed of light in vacuum is exactly 299,792,458 metres per second.

confirmed.text: Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level.

confirmed.text: Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy in plants.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy.

confirmed.text: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceans.

confirmed.text: Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: At standard pressure, water freezes at 0 °C.

confirmed.text: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris, France.
confirmed.label: SUPPORTED
confirmed.quote: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.
